message:
Add credential storage module for CLI authentication

Implements secure credential storage with:
- XDG Base Directory compliant storage (~/.config/jfp/credentials.json)
- Atomic file writes via temp file to prevent corruption
- Token expiry checking with 5-minute buffer for clock skew
- JFP_TOKEN environment variable override for CI/CD
- Secure file permissions (0o600 for file, 0o700 for directory)

Functions: loadCredentials, saveCredentials, clearCredentials,
isExpired, getAccessToken, isLoggedIn, getCurrentUser

Includes 33 comprehensive unit tests covering:
- Missing/corrupt credential file handling
- Expiry checking edge cases
- Environment variable override
- File permission verification (Unix)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
